id: aa63043f-1824-5a8d-8f4b-b5a3470b3c5f
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-12243 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12243
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/30
modified: 2026/06/30
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: low
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-12243 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-30T02:31:51Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-12243", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-12243 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1748096; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-30, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/30
modified: 2026/06/30
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access

level: critical
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-48558 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-30T02:31:51Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-48558", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-48558 Exploitation Attempt - KEV_EXPLOIT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2069509; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-30, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

title: gonic has arbitrary file write in createPlaylist: any authenticated user can write playlist M3U content to attacker-controlled path on the host
description:
## Summary

A logic error in `ServeCreateOrUpdatePlaylist` allows **any authenticated Subsonic user** (including non-admin) to write playlist M3U content to an attacker-controlled absolute filesystem path on the gonic host, and to create intermediate directories with `0o777` permissions.

The bug is independent of the playlist ownership IDOR fixed in [`6dd71e6`](https://github.com/sentriz/gonic/commit/6dd71e6): it is an **unreachable guard clause** combined with **no path containment in `Store.Write`**.

## Root cause — unreachable guard clause

`server/ctrlsubsonic/handlers_playlist.go:74-90`:

```go
func (c *Controller) ServeCreateOrUpdatePlaylist(r *http.Request) *spec.Response {
    user := r.Context().Value(CtxUser).(*db.User)
    params := r.Context().Value(CtxParams).(params.Params)

    playlistID, _ := params.GetFirstID("id", "playlistId")
    playlistPath := playlistIDDecode(playlistID)   // attacker-controlled, base64-decoded

    var playlist playlistp.Playlist
    if playl
confidence_rationale: Single source with minimal corroborating evidence
recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window
